data.title: Predicted LDO price recovery to $0.37 by March 2026, with short-term target at $0.35 and support at $0.32.
data.description: Summary of LDO Price Prediction In the short term (1 week), the projected price target for LDO is $0.35. Looking ahead to the medium term (1 month), the expected range is between $0.33 and $0.37. A significant bullish breakout is anticipated if the price reaches $0.37. On the downside, the critical support level stands at $0.32. The predictions were made by a cryptocurrency analyst.

data.title: Investors shift to alternative cryptocurrencies with double-digit weekly gains while Bitcoin stagnates. Most altcoins are still below record highs amid impending macro data.
data.description: Many alternative cryptocurrencies, or altcoins, have seen significant gains in the past week, with double-digit increases in their value. Meanwhile, Bitcoin has been trading within a range, not experiencing significant fluctuations. However, the majority of altcoins are still far from reaching their previous record highs. Investors are closely watching macroeconomic data to determine the future direction of the market.

data.title: PEPE price expected to consolidate till March 2026. RSI at 52.37 suggests neutral territory, possible move ahead.

These factors point towards potential consolidation before the next significant movement in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: nVent Electric plc (NYSE: NVT) will pay a quarterly cash dividend of US$0.21 per share on May 8, 2026.
data.description: On February 16, 2026, nVent Electric plc (NYSE: NVT) disclosed plans to distribute a standard quarterly cash dividend of US$0.21 per ordinary share. This payout is scheduled for May 8, 2026, and will be extended to shareholders listed on record as of April 24, 2026.

data.title: Ant Group releases Ling-2.5-1T, Ring-2.5-1T, new AI models with trillion parameters, available under open licenses.
data.description: Hangzhou, China - Ant Group unveiled two cutting-edge models: Ling-2.5-1T, a trillion-parameter large language model, and Ring-2.5-1T, the world's first hybrid linear-architecture thinking model. These advancements are part of the Ling 2.0 series introduced in October 2025. The models are now accessible under open licenses on platforms like Hugging Face and ModelScope. Ling-2.5-1T, the latest flagship in Ant Group's Ling model series, aims to enhance reasoning efficiency and is a significant development in the AI landscape.

data.description: Algorand is exhibiting signs of a potential recovery as per various analysts who predict a price target ranging between $0.11 to $0.19 by March 2026. The current price stands at $0.095, indicating oversold conditions and offering a strategic entry point for interested investors.

data.title: Horse-themed cryptos surge before Lunar New Year, with MEME HORSE up by 2% at $6.3 million market cap, and FKH up by 3% at $232,400 valuation.
data.description: Horse-themed cryptocurrencies surged in anticipation of the Lunar New Year, marking the start of the Year of the Fire Horse. The MEME HORSE (MHORSE) token, based on the BNB Chain (CRYPTO: BNB), saw a rise of over 2% in the past day, with a current market capitalization of $6.3 million. Another horse-themed token, Flying Ketamine Horse (FKH), based on Solana (CRYPTO: SOL), increased by nearly 3% compared to the day before, holding a market value of $232,400. This information was provided by CoinGecko. Visit Benzinga.com for the complete article.
